summary: Replace 125+ explicit any annotations and 8 as-any casts with proper types across the monorepo
details: Replaced error: any with error: unknown in catch blocks, any params/variables with Record<string, unknown> or specific interfaces (SkillEntry, ConfigLoaderModule, MetricsCollectorInstance, MemoryGraphMessage), as any casts with proper type assertions, and JSDoc {any} with {unknown} in JS files. No runtime behavior changes.
impact: Low - type annotations only, no runtime behavior changes
